title: RAG Basics
text: Retrieval-Augmented Generation first retrieves relevant documents and then asks the model to answer with those documents as context.

title: Chunking
text: Chunking splits long documents into smaller pieces. Good chunk size and overlap often improve recall quality.

title: Embeddings
text: Embeddings convert text into vectors. Similar meaning usually maps to nearby vectors in embedding space.

title: Reranking
text: Reranking rescoring can improve top-k quality after the initial retrieval stage.

title: Agentic RAG
text: Agentic RAG lets an agent decide when to retrieve, rewrite queries, perform multi-step retrieval, and stop when evidence is sufficient.

title: Evaluation
text: RAG evaluation often includes retrieval metrics like recall at k and generation metrics like answer correctness and groundedness.
